## Change Type

<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] `feat` — New feature

- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `test` — Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `chore` — Build, CI, config, or tooling
- [ ] `style` — Formatting, linting (no logic change)
